message: I've been thinking about how much easier it feels to handle a curveball when you've already thought through what you'd do. There's this great resource out there that walks you through creating a simple family plan—nothing scary, just the practical stuff like where you'd meet or how you'd stay in touch. Honestly, having that conversation with my family was way less stressful than I expected, and it's kind of nice knowing we're on the same page. Have you and your people ever sat down to chat through a plan together?
